title: Share dialog: connect a hub in place, and clearer local-only links
summary: With no hub connected, the Share dialog now offers a Connect a hub button that opens the status bar's connection panel — which can now actually connect one. Links minted on a localhost/LAN hub are labelled Local only, and Copy/QR ask for a confirming click so a link that only works on your network isn't shared as if it were public.
highlights: Connect a hub straight from the Share dialog
Local-only links are labelled and confirm before copy/QR
